USER: the foo package tests are failing, please fix them
AI: Let me run the tests to see the failure.
  > Bash: go test ./foo/... -run TestBar
AI: TestBar fails on a nil pointer. Fixing the guard.
  > Edit: foo/bar.go
  > Bash: go test ./foo/... -run TestBar
AI: Tests pass now.
USER: now write a short doc explaining the bar helper and decide whether to mention the legacy path
AI: I'll draft docs and judge whether the legacy note belongs.
  > Write: docs/bar.md
  > Read: foo/legacy.go
AI: Including a brief legacy note since it is still referenced.
